title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Medical Officer with drive and ambition, Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions:
Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions!
